page.heading: Skills
page.subtitle: Reusable, user-editable review instructions shared across agents. Pure text + config — no tools, no code.

empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: A skill is a reusable block of review instructions you attach to agents. Create one, or import a Markdown / .zip skill.

card.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

create.title: Create skill
create.subtitle: A skill is reusable review instructions — pure text, attached to agents.
create.defaultBody:
# Rule
Describe what the agent should check…

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — phrase it as a directive (e.g. "Flag tests that only cover the happy path"). Shown to the agent.
fields.bodyHint: The instructions appended to the agent's prompt. Stored as data — never executed.

import.title: Import skill
import.subtitle: Upload a Markdown file or a .zip — only the skill body is extracted.
import.trust: Heads up: an imported skill is someone else's instructions injected into your agent's prompt. Review the body below before saving. The executable part of an archive is never read or run.
import.fileHint: We extract only the Markdown body. Other archive entries are listed but never executed.
import.bodyHint: Review before saving. Imported skills are saved disabled until you vet + enable them.

detail.selectBody: Choose a skill from the list to view and edit its config, preview, stats and version history.

preview.heading: Skill body
preview.note: Rendered as raw text — never executed as Markdown or HTML.

stats.title: Stats coming soon
stats.body: Per-skill usage — runs, acceptance rate and average cost — lands in a later lesson.

editor.name: Name
editor.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — phrase it as a directive. Shown to the agent under the field.
editor.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.
